name: mnist-live-test
command: set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/mnist-output; python3 -u train.py --data-dir /lambda/nfs/research/datasets/mnist --output-dir /home/ubuntu/mnist-output --epochs 1000 --checkpoint-count 20 --checkpoint-interval-seconds 30 2>&1 | tee /home/ubuntu/mnist-output/training.log
